title: Industry 1.0
subtitle: The Age of Mechanization
description: The adventure begins and our first destination is the world of industry. So what are you waiting for? Take your seats and enjoy the journey with us.

title: Industry 2.0
subtitle: The Age of Electrification
description: Are you still with us ? Our adventure is still on and we just arrived at our next station : industry 2.0 . It's a new area with marvelous inventions you don't wanna miss : ENJOY !

title: Industry 3.0
subtitle: The Digital Revolution
description: Welcome to Industry 3.0! The digital revolution brought computers, automation, and the birth of the internet — forever changing the way factories operate.

title: Industry 4.0
subtitle: The Smart Factory Era
description: Industry 4.0 — the era of smart factories, AI, IoT, and cyber-physical systems. Discover how technology is reshaping manufacturing and beyond.
